data.description:
# Re-home CLAUDE.md-native content into authoritative docs

## Why

Five sections of `CLAUDE.md` have NO backing doc — they are the only home for their content:
the `idea` status, session logs (`session_log` type behavior), ticket hierarchy + the
parent-first claim/transition cascade, linking (the six relations + blocking-link hierarchy
promotion), and tags (convergent `TAG_DELTA` add/remove semantics). Before the root file can
be slimmed, this content must land in `docs/` so nothing is lost and both rebar's own
`AGENTS.md` and the client template can point at one source of truth.

## What

Give each of the five native sections an authoritative `docs/` home. Prefer folding into the
closest existing doc where one fits (e.g. session-log behavior near `docs/event-schema.md`;
cascade/linking/tags near `docs/concurrency.md`) and create a single new `docs/ticket-model.md`
for the material that has no natural existing home (idea status + hierarchy + linking + tags),
rather than scattering. Copy content faithfully (no semantic loss), then update
`docs/README.md`'s index to list the new/updated docs.

## Scope

In: `docs/` (new/updated doc files) and `docs/README.md`. Out: editing `CLAUDE.md` itself
(that happens in the AGENTS.md story, which replaces these sections with pointers) and any
runtime/code change.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Each of the five native topics (idea status, session logs, hierarchy + parent-first
  cascade, linking + promotion, tags/TAG_DELTA) has an authoritative doc home with a heading.
  - Proving: `rg -l 'parent-first|TAG_DELTA|hierarchy promotion|status .idea.|session_log' docs/`
    returns the doc(s) covering all five.
- [ ] The moved content is semantically complete vs. the current `CLAUDE.md` sections (reviewer
  confirms via side-by-side diff in the change description; no rule dropped).
- [ ] `docs/README.md` index references the new/updated doc(s).
  - Proving: `rg -n 'ticket-model|idea status|tags' docs/README.md`
- [ ] `make lint` passes (docs-only change; no code touched).
data.title: Re-home CLAUDE.md-native content into authoritative docs
